creator: BlueSkiesApplePies+FreeBUG@pm.me
text:
This is still present in 12.1-p10:

# grep rpcbind /etc/rc.conf
rpcbind_enable="YES"
rpcbind_flags="-h 10.10.1.40"

# ps auxwww | grep rpcbind
root   6191    0.0  0.0  11332  2792  -  Ss   16Sep20      1:19.83 /usr/sbin/rpcbind -h 10.10.1.40

# sockstat -l4 | grep rpcbind
root     rpcbind    6191  9  udp4   127.0.0.1:111         *:*
root     rpcbind    6191  10 udp4   10.10.1.40:111        *:*
root     rpcbind    6191  11 udp4   *:1011                *:*
root     rpcbind    6191  12 tcp4   127.0.0.1:111         *:*
root     rpcbind    6191  13 tcp4   10.10.1.40:111        *:*
